t.yusuf-ali: When it is said to them, "Prostrate to (Allah) Most Gracious!", they say, "And what is (Allah) Most Gracious? Shall we prostrate to that which thou commandest us?" And it increases their flight (from the Truth)
t.pickthall: And when it is said unto them: Prostrate to the Beneficent! they say: And what is the Beneficent? Are we to prostrate to whatever thou (Muhammad) biddest us? And it increaseth aversion in them
t.arberry: But when they are told, 'Bow yourselves to the All-merciful,' they say, 'And what is the All-merciful? Shall we bow ourselves to what thou biddest us?' And it increases them in aversion
t.hilali-khan: And when it is said to them: "Prostrate to the Most Beneficent (Allah)! They say: "And what is the Most Beneficent? Shall we fall down in prostration to that which you (O Muhammad SAW) command us?" And it increases in them only aversion
t.itani: And when it is said to them, “Bow down to the Merciful,” they say, “And what is the Merciful? Are we to bow down to whatever you command us?” And it increases their aversion.
t.mubarakpuri: And when it is said to them: "Prostrate yourselves to Ar-Rahman!" They say: "And what is Ar-Rahman Shall we fall down in prostration to that which you command us" And it increases in them only aversion.
t.qarib: Yet, when they are told, "Prostrate yourselves before the Merciful-to-all," they say, "And who is the 'Merciful-to-all'? Should we prostrate ourselves before whatever you order us [to worship]?" And they turn farther away
t.wahiduddin: When they are told, "Prostrate yourselves before the Gracious One," they ask, "Who is this Gracious One? Shall we prostrate ourselves before whatever you will?" This increases their aversion
t.shakir: And when it is said to them: Prostrate to the Beneficent Allah, they say: And what is the Allah of beneficence? Shall we prostrate to what you bid us? And it adds to their aversion
t.haleem: Yet when they are told, ‘Bow down before the Lord of Mercy,’ they say, ‘What is the Lord of Mercy? Should we bow down before anything you command?’ and they turn even further away
t.maariful: And when it is said to them, “Prostrate yourselves to the RaHmān (the All-Merciful, Allah),” they say “What is RaHmān? Shall we prostrate ourselves to the one to whom you direct us?” And it increases nothing in them except aversion
t.khattab: When it is said to them, “Prostrate to the Most Compassionate,” they ask ˹in disgust˺, “What is ‘the Most Compassionate’? Will we prostrate to whatever you order us to?” And it only drives them farther away
t.ghali: And when it is said to them, "Prostrate yourselves to The All-Merciful, " they have said, "And what is The All-Merciful? Shall we prostrate ourselves to what you command us?" And it has increased them in repulsion. * A prostraion is to be peformed after reading this
t.irving: When they are told: "Bow down on your knees before the Mercy-giving," they say: "What is the Mercy-giving" Are we to bow down on our knees just because you order us to?" It merely increases their disdain
t.iwq: And when it is said to them, "Prostrate to the Ever-Merciful," they say, "And what is the Ever-Merciful? Should we prostrate to that which you order us?" And it increases them in aversion

t_id.kemenag: Dan apabila dikatakan kepada mereka: "Sujudlah kamu sekalian kepada yang Maha Penyayang", mereka menjawab: "Siapakah yang Maha Penyayang itu? Apakah kami akan sujud kepada Tuhan Yang kamu perintahkan kami(bersujud kepada-Nya)?", dan (perintah sujud itu) menambah mereka jauh (dari iman).
t_id.sabiq: Apabila dikatakan kepada orang-orang kafir, "Tunduklah kepada Zat yang Maha Pengasih," maka jawaban mereka adalah berupa keingkaran dan sikap masa bodoh terhadap Zat yang Maha Pengasih itu. Mereka berkata, "Siapa Dzat yang Maha Pengasih itu? Kami tidak mengenal-Nya sehingga tidak perlu tunduk kepada-Nya. Lagi pula, haruskah kami tunduk karena sekadar mengikuti perintahmu?" Demikianlah, mereka semakin jauh dan lari dari keimanan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila dikatakan kepada mereka) yaitu penduduk Mekah ("Sujudlah kamu sekalian kepada Yang Maha Pemurah", mereka menjawab, "Siapakah Yang Maha Pemurah itu? Apakah kami akan sujud kepada Tuhan yang kamu perintahkan kami bersujud kepada-Nya?") lafal Ta`muruuna dapat dibaca Ya`muruuna dan yang memerintahkan kepada mereka untuk bersujud adalah Nabi Muhammad. Makna ayat; kami tidak mengetahui-Nya, maka kami tidak mau bersujud kepada-Nya (dan makin menambah mereka) perintah bersujud yang ditujukan kepada mereka itu menambah mereka (semakin jauh) dari iman. Maka Allah swt. berfirman,
t_id.iwq: Dan apabila dikatakan kepada mereka: "Sujudlah kamu sekalian kepada yang Maha Penyayang", mereka menjawab: "Siapakah yang Maha Penyayang itu? Apakah kami akan sujud kepada Tuhan Yang kamu perintahkan kami(bersujud kepada-Nya)?", dan (perintah sujud itu) menambah mereka jauh (dari iman).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإذا قيل لهم» لكفار مكة «اسجدوا للرحمن قالوا وما الرحمن أنسجد لما تأمرنا» بالفوقانية والتحتانية والآمر محمد ولا نعرفه صلى الله علية وسلم لا «وزادهم» هذا القول لهم «نفورا» عن الإيمان قال تعالى
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱسۡجُدُواْۤ لِلرَّحۡمَٰنِ قَالُواْ وَمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ أَنَسۡجُدُ لِمَا تَأۡمُرُنَا وَزَادَهُمۡ نُفُورٗا۩ (نُفُورًا: بُعْدًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan apabila dikatakan kepada mereka) yaitu penduduk Mekah ("Sujudlah kamu sekalian kepada Yang Maha Pemurah", mereka menjawab, "Siapakah Yang Maha Pemurah itu? Apakah kami akan sujud kepada Tuhan yang kamu perintahkan kami bersujud kepada-Nya?") lafal Ta`muruuna dapat dibaca Ya`muruuna dan yang memerintahkan kepada mereka untuk bersujud adalah Nabi Muhammad. Makna ayat; kami tidak mengetahui-Nya, maka kami tidak mau bersujud kepada-Nya (dan makin menambah mereka) perintah bersujud yang ditujukan kepada mereka itu menambah mereka (semakin jauh) dari iman. Maka Allah swt. berfirman

ar: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِی جَعَلَ فِی ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ بُرُوجࣰا وَجَعَلَ فِیهَا سِرَ ٰجࣰا وَقَمَرࣰا مُّنِیرࣰا
ar_simple: تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ فِي السَّمَاءِ بُرُوجًا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرَاجًا وَقَمَرًا مُنِيرًا

t.sahih-int: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a [burning] lamp and luminous moon
t.asad: HALLOWED is He who has set up in the skies great constellations, and has placed among them a [radiant] lamp and a light-giving moon
t.yusuf-ali: Blessed is He Who made constellations in the skies, and placed therein a Lamp and a Moon giving light
t.pickthall: Blessed be He Who hath placed in the heaven mansions of the stars, and hath placed therein a great lamp and a moon giving light
t.arberry: Blessed be He who has set in heaven constellations, and has set among them a lamp, and an illuminating moon
t.hilali-khan: Blessed be He Who has placed in the heaven big stars, and has placed therein a great lamp (sun), and a moon giving light
t.itani: Blessed is He who placed constellations in the sky, and placed in it a lamp, and an illuminating moon.
t.mubarakpuri: Blessed be He Who has placed in the heaven Al-Buruj, and has placed therein a great lamp, and a moon giving light.
t.qarib: Blessed is He who has placed constellations in the sky, a radiant light and glowing moon
t.wahiduddin: Exalted is He who put constellations in the heavens, a radiant lamp and an illuminating moon
t.shakir: Blessed is He Who made the constellations in the heavens and made therein a lamp and a shining moon
t.haleem: Exalted is He who put constellations in the heavens, a radiant light, and an illuminating moon
t.maariful: Glorious is the One who made stellar formations in the sky, and placed therein a lamp (i.e. the sun) and a bright moon
t.khattab: Blessed is the One Who has placed constellations in the sky, as well as a ˹radiant˺ lamp and a luminous moon
t.ghali: Supremely Blessed is He Who has made in the heaven constellations, and He has made therein a luminary and an enlightening moon
t.irving: Blessed is the One Who has placed constellations in the sky and set a beacon in it, plus a shining moon
t.iwq: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a burning lamp and luminous moon

t_id.kemenag: Maha Suci Allah yang menjadikan di langit gugusan-gugusan bintang dan Dia menjadikan juga padanya matahari dan bulan yang bercahaya.
t_id.sabiq: Mahasuci Allah dan Mahabanyak karunia-Nya. Dia menciptakan planet-planet di langit dan menciptakan garis orbit tempatnya beredar. Di antara planet-planet itu, Dia menjadikan matahari dan bulan yang bercahaya(1). (1) Ayat ini mengandung beberapa penafsiran ilmiah terhadap sistem alam raya yang diciptakan oleh Allah. Kita lihat bintang-bintang di langit berbentuk gugusan yang tidak berubah-ubah sepanjang masa. "Al-Bur3j" yang dimaksud dalam ayat di atas adalah gugusan bintang (rasi) yang dilalui matahari ketika secara lahir berputar mengelilingi bumi. Gugusan bintang tersebut seakan-akan menjadi tempat berputarnya matahari sepanjang tahun. Setiap tiga bulan terjadi satu musim yang dimulai dengan musim semi. Rasi-rasi tersebut adalah sebagai berikut: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagitarius, Capricornus, Aquarius dan Pisces. Matahari adalah salah satu bintang yang tidak terlalu besar dan tidak terlalu kecil. Seperti halnya bintang-bintang lain, matahari bersinar dengan sendirinya karena interaksi atom yang ada di dalamnya. Sinar matahari yang timbul dari energi tersebut jatuh ke planet-planet, bumi, bulan dan benda-benda langit lainnya yang tidak dapat bersinar. Karena bersifat menyinari, maka matahari disebut sirâj yang berarti 'lampu yang terang benderang'. Adapun bulan disebut munîr, yang berarti 'bercahaya', karena cahayanya timbul akibat adanya sinar matahari yang jatuh di permukaannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maha Suci) yakni Maha Agung (Allah yang telah menjadikan di langit gugusan-gugusan bintang) yang ada dua belas, yaitu: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagitarius, Capricornus, Aquarius dan Pisces. Gugusan-gugusan tersebut merupakan garis edar dari tujuh planet yang beredar, yaitu planet Mars mempunyai Aries dan Scorpio, Gemini dan Virgo, planet Bulan mempunyai Cancer, planet Matahari mempunyai Leo, planet Yupiter mempunyai Sagitarius dan Pisces, planet Uranus mempunyai Capricornus dan Aquarius (dan Dia menjadikan padanya) juga (lampu) yakni matahari (dan bulan yang bercahaya) menurut suatu qiraat lafal Siraajan dibaca Suruujan dengan ungkapan jamak. Arti Muniiran adalah Nayyiraatin yakni yang bercahaya. Sengaja di sini hanya disebutkan bulan di antara planet-planet tersebut karena mengingat keutamaan yang dimilikinya.
t_id.iwq: Maha Suci Allah yang menjadikan di langit gugusan-gugusan bintang dan Dia menjadikan juga padanya matahari dan bulan yang bercahaya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «تبارك» تعاظم «الذي جعل في السماء بروجا» اثني عشر: الحمل والثور والجوزاء والسرطان والأسد، والسنبلة والميزان والعقرب والقوس والجدي والدلو والحوت، وهي منازل الكواكب السبعة السيارة المريخ وله الحمل والعقرب، والزهرة ولها الثور والميزان، وعطارد وله الجوزاء والسنبلة والقمر وله السرطان والشمس ولها الأسد، والمشتري وله القوس والحوت، وزحل وله الجدي والدلو «وجَعَلَ» «فيها» أيضا «سراجا» هو الشمس «وقمرا منيرا» وفي قراءة سُرُجا بالجمع: أي نيرات، وخصّ القمر منها بالذكر لنوع فضيلة
tafsir.siraj-ar: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجٗا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرَٰجٗا وَقَمَرٗا مُّنِيرٗا (بُرُوجًا: نُجُومًا كِبَارًا بِمَنَازِلِهَا, سِرَاجًا: شَمْسًا مُضِيئَةً)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maha Suci) yakni Maha Agung (Allah yang telah menjadikan di langit gugusan-gugusan bintang) yang ada dua belas, yaitu: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagitarius, Capricornus, Aquarius dan Pisces. Gugusan-gugusan tersebut merupakan garis edar dari tujuh planet yang beredar, yaitu planet Mars mempunyai Aries dan Scorpio, Gemini dan Virgo, planet Bulan mempunyai Cancer, planet Matahari mempunyai Leo, planet Yupiter mempunyai Sagitarius dan Pisces, planet Uranus mempunyai Capricornus dan Aquarius (dan Dia menjadikan padanya) juga (lampu) yakni matahari (dan bulan yang bercahaya) menurut suatu qiraat lafal Siraajan dibaca Suruujan dengan ungkapan jamak. Arti Muniiran adalah Nayyiraatin yakni yang bercahaya. Sengaja di sini hanya disebutkan bulan di antara planet-planet tersebut karena mengingat keutamaan yang dimilikinya

ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِی جَعَلَ ٱلَّیۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ خِلۡفَةࣰ لِّمَنۡ أَرَادَ أَن یَذَّكَّرَ أَوۡ أَرَادَ شُكُورࣰا
ar_simple: وَهُوَ الَّذِي جَعَلَ اللَّيْلَ وَالنَّهَارَ خِلْفَةً لِمَنْ أَرَادَ أَنْ يَذَّكَّرَ أَوْ أَرَادَ شُكُورًا

t.sahih-int: And it is He who has made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude
t.asad: And He it is who causes the night and the day to succeed one another, [revealing Himself in His works] unto him who has the will to take thought - that is has the will to be grateful
t.yusuf-ali: And it is He Who made the Night and the Day to follow each other: for such as have the will to celebrate His praises or to show their gratitude
t.pickthall: And He it is Who hath appointed night and day in succession, for him who desireth to remember, or desireth thankfulness
t.arberry: And it is He who made the night and day a succession for whom He desires to remember or He desires to be thankful
t.hilali-khan: And He it is Who has put the night and the day in succession, for such who desires to remember or desires to show his gratitude
t.itani: And it is He who made the night and the day alternate—for whoever desires to reflect, or desires to show gratitude.
t.mubarakpuri: And He it is Who has put the night and the day in succession (Khilfatan), for such who desires to remember or desires to show his gratitude.
t.qarib: And It is He who has made night and day succeed each other, [revealing Himself to] for anyone who wishes to be mindful or show gratitude
t.wahiduddin: it is He who has made night and day succeed each other, a sign for those who would take heed and would be grateful
t.shakir: And He it is Who made the night and the day to follow each other for him who desires to be mindful or desires to be thankful
t.haleem: it is He who made the night and day follow each other- so anyone who wishes may be mindful or show gratitude
t.maariful: And He is the One who made the day and the night following each other, for the one who wishes to be mindful or wishes to show gratitude
t.khattab: And He is the One Who causes the day and the night to alternate, ˹as a sign˺ for whoever desires to be mindful or to be grateful
t.ghali: And He is the One Who has made the night and day-time a succession for whomever is willing to constantly remember (Or: for whomever He wills to be mindful; or: whomever He wills) or whomever is willing to give constant thanks
t.irving: He is the One Who has granted night and daytime in succession for anyone who wants to reflect (on it) or wants [to show] gratitude
t.iwq: And it is He who has made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude

t_id.kemenag: Dan Dia (pula) yang menjadikan malam dan siang silih berganti bagi orang yang ingin mengambil pelajaran atau orang yang ingin bersyukur.
t_id.sabiq: Allahlah yang menjadikan malam dan siang secara silih berganti, yang satu datang menggantikan yang lain. Kami atur semua ini agar siapa saja dapat mengambil pelajaran dari aturan semacam ini, sehingga dapat mengetahui kebijaksanaan dan kekuasaan Allah. Atau agar ia dapat menyukuri nikmat yang agung ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan Dia pula yang menjadikan malam dan siang silih berganti) yakni satu sama lainnya saling silih berganti dengan yang lainnya (bagi orang yang ingin mengambil pelajaran) dapat dibaca Yadzdzakkara dan Yadzkura, yang pembahasannya sebagaimana pada ayat sebelumnya. Yakni, ia ingat akan kebaikan yang tidak dilakukan pada salah satu di antaranya, kemudian ia melakukan pada waktu yang lainnya, sebagai ganti dari apa yang tidak dilakukannya di waktu yang pertama tadi (atau orang yang ingin bersyukur) atas nikmat Rabb yang telah dilimpahkan kepadanya pada dua waktu itu.
t_id.iwq: Dan Dia (pula) yang menjadikan malam dan siang silih berganti bagi orang yang ingin mengambil pelajaran atau orang yang ingin bersyukur.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وهو الذي جعل الليل والنهار خلفة» أي يخلف كل منهما الآخر «لمن أراد أن يذَّكَّر» بالتشديد والتخفيف كما تقدم: ما فاته في أحدهما من خير فيفعله في الآخر «أو أراد شُكور» أي شكرا لنعمة ربه عليه فيهما
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ خِلۡفَةٗ لِّمَنۡ أَرَادَ أَن يَذَّكَّرَ أَوۡ أَرَادَ شُكُورٗا (خِلْفَةً: مُتَعَاقِبَيْنِ يَخْلُفُ أَحَدُهُمَا الآخَرَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan Dia pula yang menjadikan malam dan siang silih berganti) yakni satu sama lainnya saling silih berganti dengan yang lainnya (bagi orang yang ingin mengambil pelajaran) dapat dibaca Yadzdzakkara dan Yadzkura, yang pembahasannya sebagaimana pada ayat sebelumnya. Yakni, ia ingat akan kebaikan yang tidak dilakukan pada salah satu di antaranya, kemudian ia melakukan pada waktu yang lainnya, sebagai ganti dari apa yang tidak dilakukannya di waktu yang pertama tadi (atau orang yang ingin bersyukur) atas nikmat Rabb yang telah dilimpahkan kepadanya pada dua waktu itu

ar: وَعِبَادُ ٱلرَّحۡمَـٰنِ ٱلَّذِینَ یَمۡشُونَ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ هَوۡنࣰا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ ٱلۡجَـٰهِلُونَ قَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمࣰا
ar_simple: وَعِبَادُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ الْجَاهِلُونَ قَالُوا سَلَامًا

t.sahih-int: And the servants of the Most Merciful are those who walk upon the earth easily, and when the ignorant address them [harshly], they say [words of] peace
t.asad: For, [true] servants of the Most Gracious are [only] they who walk gently on earth, and who, whenever the foolish address them, reply with [words of] peace
t.yusuf-ali: And the servants of (Allah) Most Gracious are those who walk on the earth in humility, and when the ignorant address them, they say, "Peace
t.pickthall: The (faithful) slaves of the Beneficent are they who walk upon the earth modestly, and when the foolish ones address them answer: Peace
t.arberry: The servants of the All-merciful are those who walk in the earth modestly and who, when the ignorant address them, say, 'Peace
t.hilali-khan: And the slaves of the Most Beneficent (Allah) are those who walk on the earth in humility and sedateness, and when the foolish address them (with bad words) they reply back with mild words of gentleness
t.itani: The servants of the Merciful are those who walk the earth in humility, and when the ignorant address them, they say, “Peace.”
t.mubarakpuri: And the servants of the Most Gracious are those who walk on the earth Hawna, and when the foolish address them they say; "Salama."
t.qarib: The worshipers of the Merciful-to-all are those who walk upon the earth with humility, and when the ignorant address them, reply with "peace
t.wahiduddin: The true servants of the Gracious One are those who walk upon the earth with humility and when they are addressed by the ignorant ones, their response is, "Peace
t.shakir: And the servants of the Beneficent Allah are they who walk on the earth in humbleness, and when the ignorant address them, they say: Peace
t.haleem: The servants of the Lord of Mercy are those who walk humbly on the earth, and who, when the foolish address them, reply, ‘Peace’
t.maariful: The servants of the RaHmān (the All-Merciful, Allah) are those who walk on the earth humbly, and when the ignorant people speak to them, they reply peacefully
t.khattab: The ˹true˺ servants of the Most Compassionate are those who walk on the earth humbly, and when the foolish address them ˹improperly˺, they only respond with peace
t.ghali: And the bondmen of The All-Merciful are the ones who walk on the earth gently, and when the ignorant address them, they say, "Peace
t.irving: and the Mercy-giving´s servants who walk modestly on earth and peacefully say: "How do you do!" whenever ignorant men address them
t.iwq: And the servants of the Ever-Merciful are those who walk upon the earth easily, and when the ignorant address them harshly, they say words of peace

t_id.kemenag: Dan hamba-hamba Tuhan yang Maha Penyayang itu (ialah) orang-orang yang berjalan di atas bumi dengan rendah hati dan apabila orang-orang jahil menyapa mereka, mereka mengucapkan kata-kata (yang mengandung) keselamatan.
t_id.sabiq: Hamba-hamba Tuhan Yang Maha Penyayang itu adalah mereka yang mempunyai ciri-ciri sebagai berikut. Pertama, bersikap rendah hati di dunia ini. Apabila berjalan di muka bumi, mereka selalu berjalan dengan tenang. Demikian pula dalam segala amal perbuatan. Jika mereka dicaci oleh orang-orang musyrik yang jahil, mereka membiarkannya dan mengatakan kepada mereka, "Kami tidak ada urusan dengan kalian, bahkan kami berdoa untuk keselamatan kalian."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan hamba-hamba Allah Yang Maha Pemurah itu) yakni hamba-hamba-Nya yang baik. Lafal ayat ini dan kalimat sesudahnya, berkedudukan menjadi Mubtada, yaitu sampai dengan firman-Nya, "Ulaika Yujzauna" dan seterusnya, tanpa ada jumlah lain yang menyisipinya (yaitu orang-orang yang berjalan di atas bumi dengan rendah hati) dengan tenang dan rendah diri (dan apabila orang-orang jahil menyapa mereka) mengajak mereka berbicara mengenai hal-hal yang tidak disukainya (mereka mengucapkan kata-kata yang mengandung keselamatan) perkataan yang menghindarkan diri mereka dari dosa.
t_id.iwq: Dan hamba-hamba Tuhan yang Maha Penyayang itu (ialah) orang-orang yang berjalan di atas bumi dengan rendah hati dan apabila orang-orang jahil menyapa mereka, mereka mengucapkan kata-kata (yang mengandung) keselamatan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وعباد الرحمن» مبتدأ وما بعده صفات له إلى أولئك يجزون غير المعترض فيه «الذي يمشون على الأرض هوْنا» أي بسكينة وتواضع «وإذا خاطبهم الجاهلون» بما يكرهونه «قالوا سلاما» أي قولا يَسلمون فيه من الإثم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَعِبَادُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَمۡشُونَ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ هَوۡنٗا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ ٱلۡجَٰهِلُونَ قَالُواْ سَلَٰمٗا (هَوْنًا: بِسَكِينَةٍ، وَوَقَارٍ، وَتَوَاضُعٍ, قَالُوا سَلَامًا: خَاطَبُوا الجَاهِلَ بِكَلَامٍ يَسْلَمُونَ فِيهِ مِنَ الإِثْمِ، وَلَمْ يُقَابِلُوهُ بِجَهْلِهِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan hamba-hamba Allah Yang Maha Pemurah itu) yakni hamba-hamba-Nya yang baik. Lafal ayat ini dan kalimat sesudahnya, berkedudukan menjadi Mubtada, yaitu sampai dengan firman-Nya, "Ulaika Yujzauna" dan seterusnya, tanpa ada jumlah lain yang menyisipinya (yaitu orang-orang yang berjalan di atas bumi dengan rendah hati) dengan tenang dan rendah diri (dan apabila orang-orang jahil menyapa mereka) mengajak mereka berbicara mengenai hal-hal yang tidak disukainya (mereka mengucapkan kata-kata yang mengandung keselamatan) perkataan yang menghindarkan diri mereka dari dosa

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ یَبِیتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمۡ سُجَّدࣰا وَقِیَـٰمࣰا
ar_simple: وَالَّذِينَ يَبِيتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمْ سُجَّدًا وَقِيَامًا

t.sahih-int: And those who spend [part of] the night to their Lord prostrating and standing [in prayer]
t.asad: and who remember their Sustainer far into the night, prostrating themselves and standing
t.yusuf-ali: Those who spend the night in adoration of their Lord prostrate and standing
t.pickthall: And who spend the night before their Lord, prostrate and standing
t.arberry: who pass the night prostrate to their Lord and standing
t.hilali-khan: And those who spend the night before their Lord, prostrate and standing
t.itani: And those who pass the night prostrating themselves to their Lord and standing up.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who spend the night in worship of their Lord, prostrate and standing.
t.qarib: those who spend the night prostrating themselves and standing before their Lord
t.wahiduddin: and those who spend the night prostrating themselves, and standing before their Lord
t.shakir: And they who pass the night prostrating themselves before their Lord and standing
t.haleem: those who spend the night bowed down or standing, worshipping their Lord
t.maariful: and those who pass the night prostrating themselves and standing before their Lord
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ those who spend ˹a good portion of˺ the night, prostrating themselves and standing before their Lord
t.ghali: And the ones who spend the night, (constantly) prostrating and upright to their lord
t.irving: who spend the night bowing down on their knees and standing before their Lord
t.iwq: And those who spend part of the night to their Lord prostrating and standing in prayer

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang yang melalui malam hari dengan bersujud dan berdiri untuk Tuhan mereka.
t_id.sabiq: Kedua, mereka yang melalui malam hari dengan beribadah, salat dan selalu berzikir kepada Allah.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang melalui malam hari dengan bersujud kepada Rabb mereka) lafal Sujjadan merupakan bentuk jamak dari lafal Saajidun (dan berdiri) pada malam harinya mereka mengerjakan salat.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang yang melalui malam hari dengan bersujud dan berdiri untuk Tuhan mereka.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين يبيتون لربهم سُجَّدا» جمع ساجد «وقياما» بمعنى قائمين يصلون بالليل
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَبِيتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمۡ سُجَّدٗا وَقِيَٰمٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang melalui malam hari dengan bersujud kepada Rabb mereka) lafal Sujjadan merupakan bentuk jamak dari lafal Saajidun (dan berdiri) pada malam harinya mereka mengerjakan salat

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ یَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱصۡرِفۡ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَۖ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
ar_simple: وَالَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا

t.sahih-int: And those who say, "Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever adhering
t.asad: and who pray: “O our Sustainer, avert from us the suffering of hell - for, verily, the suffering caused by it is bound to be a torment dire
t.yusuf-ali: Those who say, "Our Lord! avert from us the Wrath of Hell, for its Wrath is indeed an affliction grievous
t.pickthall: And who say: Our Lord! Avert from us the doom of hell; lo! the doom thereof is anguish
t.arberry: who say, 'Our Lord, turn Thou from us the chastisement of Gehenna; surely its chastisement is torment most terrible
t.hilali-khan: And those who say: "Our Lord! Avert from us the torment of Hell. Verily! Its torment is ever an inseparable, permanent punishment
t.itani: And those who say, ‘‘Our Lord, avert from us the suffering of Hell, for its suffering is continuous.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who say: "Our Lord! Avert from us the torment of Hell. Verily, its torment is ever an inseparable, permanent punishment."
t.qarib: and those who say "Our Lord, spare us the punishment of Hell. Its punishment is dreadful
t.wahiduddin: who say, "Our Lord, ward off from us the punishment of Hell, for its punishment is a dreadful torment to suffer
t.shakir: And they who say: O our Lord! turn away from us the punishment of hell, surely the punishment thereof is a lasting
t.haleem: who plead, ‘Our Lord, turn away from us the suffering of Hell, for it is a dreadful torment to suffer
t.maariful: and those who say, “Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Jahannam (the Hell); indeed, its punishment is a persisting affliction.”
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ those who pray, “Our Lord! Keep the punishment of Hell away from us, for its punishment is indeed unrelenting
t.ghali: And the ones who say, "Our Lord, turn about (i.e., turn away) from us the torment of Hell; surely its torment is (really) a (grievous) penalty
t.irving: and who say: "Our Lord, ward off Hell´s torment from us! Its torment is atrocious
t.iwq: And those who say, "Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever adhering

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang berkata: "Ya Tuhan kami, jauhkan azab jahannam dari kami, sesungguhnya azabnya itu adalah kebinasaan yang kekal".
t_id.sabiq: Ketiga, mereka yang rasa takutnya lebih dominan daripada harapan, seperti halnya orang-orang yang bertakwa. Karena itu mereka takut akan siksa akhirat. Kebiasaan mereka adalah berdoa kepada Allah agar diselamatkan dari siksa jahanam. Sebab siksa jahanam itu, jika menimpa seseorang yang melakukan kejahatan, tidak akan melepaskannya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang berkata, "Ya Rabb kami! Jauhkanlah azab Jahanam dari kami, sesungguhnya azabnya itu adalah kebinasaan yang kekal") yang abadi.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang berkata: "Ya Tuhan kami, jauhkan azab neraka dari kami, sesungguhnya azabnya itu adalah kebinasaan yang kekal".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين يقولون ربنا اصرف عنا عذاب جهنم إنَّ عذابها كان غراما» أي لازما
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱصۡرِفۡ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَۖ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا (غَرَامًا: مُلَازِمًا؛ كَالغَرِيمِ (وَهُوَ الدَّائِنُ) يُلَازِمُ غَرِيمَهُ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang berkata, "Ya Rabb kami! Jauhkanlah azab Jahanam dari kami, sesungguhnya azabnya itu adalah kebinasaan yang kekal") yang abadi

ar: إِنَّهَا سَاۤءَتۡ مُسۡتَقَرࣰّا وَمُقَامࣰا
ar_simple: إِنَّهَا سَاءَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا

t.sahih-int: Indeed, it is evil as a settlement and residence
t.asad: verily, how evil an abode and a station!”
t.yusuf-ali: Evil indeed is it as an abode, and as a place to rest in
t.pickthall: Lo! it is wretched as abode and station
t.arberry: evil it is as a lodging-place and an abode
t.hilali-khan: Evil indeed it (Hell) is as an abode and as a place to dwell
t.itani: It is indeed a miserable residence and destination.”
t.mubarakpuri: Evil indeed it is as an abode and as a place to rest in.
t.qarib: It is an evil abode and resting-place
t.wahiduddin: Indeed, it is an evil abode and evil dwelling-place
t.shakir: Surely it is an evil abode and (evil) place to stay
t.haleem: It is an evil home, a foul resting place!’
t.maariful: Indeed, it is evil as an abode and a place to dwell in
t.khattab: It is certainly an evil place to settle and reside.”
t.ghali: Surely odious it is as a repository and a stationing
t.irving: it is such an evil residence and station
t.iwq: Indeed, it is evil as a settlement and residence

t_id.kemenag: Sesungguhnya jahannam itu seburuk-buruk tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya jahanam itu adalah tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman yang paling buruk bagi penghuninya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ia adalah seburuk-buruk) sejelek-jelek (tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman) yakni Jahanam adalah tempat menetap dan tempat tinggal yang paling buruk.
t_id.iwq: Sesungguhnya neraka itu seburuk-buruk tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إنها ساءت» بئست «مُستقرا ومُقاما» هي: أي موضع استقرار وإقامة
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِنَّهَا سَآءَتۡ مُسۡتَقَرّٗا وَمُقَامٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Sesungguhnya ia adalah seburuk-buruk) sejelek-jelek (tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman) yakni Jahanam adalah tempat menetap dan tempat tinggal yang paling buruk

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ إِذَاۤ أَنفَقُوا۟ لَمۡ یُسۡرِفُوا۟ وَلَمۡ یَقۡتُرُوا۟ وَكَانَ بَیۡنَ ذَ ٰلِكَ قَوَامࣰا
ar_simple: وَالَّذِينَ إِذَا أَنْفَقُوا لَمْ يُسْرِفُوا وَلَمْ يَقْتُرُوا وَكَانَ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ قَوَامًا

t.sahih-int: And [they are] those who, when they spend, do so not excessively or sparingly but are ever, between that, [justly] moderate
t.asad: and who, whenever they spend on others, are neither wasteful nor niggardly but [remember that] there is always a just mean between those [two extremes]
t.yusuf-ali: Those who, when they spend, are not extravagant and not niggardly, but hold a just (balance) between those (extremes)
t.pickthall: And those who, when they spend, are neither prodigal nor grudging; and there is ever a firm station between the two
t.arberry: who, when they expend, are neither prodigal nor parsimonious, but between that is a just stand
t.hilali-khan: And those, who, when they spend, are neither extravagant nor niggardly, but hold a medium (way) between those (extremes)
t.itani: And those who, when they spend, are neither wasteful nor stingy, but choose a middle course between that.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who, when they spend, are neither extravagant nor stingy, but are in a just balance between them.
t.qarib: They are those who, when they spend, are neither wasteful nor tightfisted, but maintain balanced spending habits
t.wahiduddin: They are those who are neither extravagant nor niggardly, but keep a balance between the two
t.shakir: And they who when they spend, are neither extravagant nor parsimonious, and (keep) between these the just mean
t.haleem: They are those who are neither wasteful nor niggardly when they spend, but keep to a just balance
t.maariful: and those who, when they spend, are neither extravagant nor miserly, and it (i.e. their spending) is moderate in between (the two extremes)
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ those who spend neither wastefully nor stingily, but moderately in between
t.ghali: And the ones who, when they expend, are neither extravagant nor grudging; and between that is an upright (mean)
t.irving: who when they spend, give neither too lavishly nor yet hold back and keep to a happy medium
t.iwq: And they are those who, when they spend, do so not excessively or sparingly but are ever, between that, justly moderate

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang apabila membelanjakan (harta), mereka tidak berlebihan, dan tidak (pula) kikir, dan adalah (pembelanjaan itu) di tengah-tengah antara yang demikian.
t_id.sabiq: Keempat, di antara tanda-tanda hamba Tuhan Yang Maha Penyayang adalah bersikap sederhana dalam membelanjakan harta, baik untuk diri mereka maupun keluarga. Mereka tidak berlebih-lebihan dan tidak pula kikir dalam pembelanjaan itu, tetapi di tengah-tengah keduanya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang apabila membelanjakan) hartanya kepada anak-anak mereka (mereka tidak berlebih-lebihan dan tidak pula kikir) dapat dibaca Yaqturuu dan Yuqtiruu, artinya tidak mempersempit perbelanjaannya (dan adalah) nafkah mereka (di antara yang demikian itu) di antara berlebih-lebihan dan kikir (mengambil jalan pertengahan) yakni tengah-tengah.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang apabila membelanjakan (harta), mereka tidak berlebihan, dan tidak (pula) kikir, dan adalah (pembelanjaan itu) di tengah-tengah antara yang demikian.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين إذا أنفقوا» على عيالهم «لم يسرفوا ولم يقتروا» بفتح أوله وضمه: أي يضيقوا «وكان» إنفاقهم «بين ذلك» الإسراف والإقتار «قواما» وسطا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَآ أَنفَقُواْ لَمۡ يُسۡرِفُواْ وَلَمۡ يَقۡتُرُواْ وَكَانَ بَيۡنَ ذَٰلِكَ قَوَامٗا (يَقْتُرُوا: يُضِيِّقُوا فِي النَّفَقَةِ, قَوَامًا: وَسَطًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang apabila membelanjakan) hartanya kepada anak-anak mereka (mereka tidak berlebih-lebihan dan tidak pula kikir) dapat dibaca Yaqturuu dan Yuqtiruu, artinya tidak mempersempit perbelanjaannya (dan adalah) nafkah mereka (di antara yang demikian itu) di antara berlebih-lebihan dan kikir (mengambil jalan pertengahan) yakni tengah-tengah

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ لَا یَدۡعُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ وَلَا یَقۡتُلُونَ ٱلنَّفۡسَ ٱلَّتِی حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا یَزۡنُونَۚ وَمَن یَفۡعَلۡ ذَ ٰلِكَ یَلۡقَ أَثَامࣰا
ar_simple: وَالَّذِينَ لَا يَدْعُونَ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا آخَرَ وَلَا يَقْتُلُونَ النَّفْسَ الَّتِي حَرَّمَ اللَّهُ إِلَّا بِالْحَقِّ وَلَا يَزْنُونَ ۚ وَمَنْ يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ يَلْقَ أَثَامًا

t.sahih-int: And those who do not invoke with Allah another deity or kill the soul which Allah has forbidden [to be killed], except by right, and do not commit unlawful sexual intercourse. And whoever should do that will meet a penalty
t.asad: and who never invoke any [imaginary] deity side by side with God, and do not take any human beings life - [the life] which God has willed to be sacred - otherwise than in [the pursuit of] justice, and do not commit adultery. And [know that] he who commits aught thereof shall [not only] meet with a full requital
t.yusuf-ali: Those who invoke not, with Allah, any other god, nor slay such life as Allah has made sacred except for just cause, nor commit fornication; - and any that does this (not only) meets punishment
t.pickthall: And those who cry not unto any other god along with Allah, nor take the life which Allah hath forbidden save in (course of) justice, nor commit adultery - and whoso doeth this shall pay the penalty
t.arberry: who call not upon another god with God, nor slay the soul God has forbidden except by right, neither fornicate, for whosoever does that shall meet the price
t.hilali-khan: And those who invoke not any other ilah (god) along with Allah, nor kill such life as Allah has forbidden, except for just cause, nor commit illegal sexual intercourse and whoever does this shall receive the punishment
t.itani: And those who do not implore besides God any other god, and do not kill the soul which God has made sacred—except in the pursuit of justice—and do not commit adultery. Whoever does that will face penalties.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who invoke not any other god along with Allah, nor kill such person as Allah has forbidden, except for just cause, nor commit illegal sexual intercourse -- and whoever does this shall receive Athama.
t.qarib: [as well as] those who never invoke another god alongside God nor kill the soul that God has forbidden [to be killed], except in the pursuit of justice, nor commit unlawful sexual intercourse. Whoever does these things will face a penalty
t.wahiduddin: those who never invoke any other deity besides God, nor take a life which God has made sacred, except with the right to do so, nor commit adultery. Anyone who does that shall face punishment
t.shakir: And they who do not call upon another god with Allah and do not slay the soul, which Allah has forbidden except in the requirements of justice, and (who) do not commit fornication and he who does this shall find a requital of sin
t.haleem: those who never invoke any other deity beside God, nor take a life, which God has made sacred, except in the pursuit of justice, nor commit adultery. (Whoever does these things will face the penalties)
t.maariful: and those who do not invoke any other god along with Allah, and do not kill a person whom Allah has given sanctity, except rightfully, nor do they fornicate; and whoever does it, shall face the recompense of his sin
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ those who do not invoke any other god besides Allah, nor take a ˹human˺ life—made sacred by Allah—except with ˹legal˺ right, nor commit fornication. And whoever does ˹any of˺ this will face the penalty
t.ghali: And the ones who do not invoke another god (along) with Allah, nor kill the self that Allah has prohibited except with the truth nor commit adultery; (i.e., illegal sexual intercourse) and whoever performs that will meet the penalty for vice
t.irving: who do not appeal to any other deity besides God [Alone]; nor kill any soul whom God has forbidden [them to] except through [due process of] law; nor misbehave sexually. Anyone who does so will incur a penalty
t.iwq: And those who do not invoke with Allah another deity or kill the soul which Allah has forbidden to be killed, except by right, and do not commit unlawful sexual intercourse. And whoever should do that will meet a penalty

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang tidak menyembah tuhan yang lain beserta Allah dan tidak membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah (membunuhnya) kecuali dengan (alasan) yang benar, dan tidak berzina, barang siapa yang melakukan yang demikian itu, niscaya dia mendapat (pembalasan) dosa(nya),
t_id.sabiq: Kelima, mereka selalu memurnikan tawhid dan membuang segala bentuk kemusyrikan dalam sembahan. Keenam, tidak membunuh jiwa yang dilarang untuk dibunuh. Tetapi jika dianiaya, mereka akan membunuh atas dasar kebenaran. Ketujuh, menjauhi perbuatan zina. Mereka mencukupkan diri dengan berbagai kenikmatan yang halal saja agar terhindar dari siksa yang membinasakan. Sesungguhnya siapa saja yang melakukan perkara-perkara jelek ini akan mendapatkan siksa.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang tidak menyembah tuhan yang lain beserta Allah dan tidak membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah) membunuhnya (kecuali dengan alasan yang benar, dan tidak berzina, barang siapa yang melakukan demikian itu) yakni salah satu di antara ketiga perbuatan tadi (niscaya dia mendapat pembalasan dosanya) hukumannya.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang tidak menyembah tuhan yang lain beserta Allah dan tidak membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah (membunuhnya) kecuali dengan (alasan) yang benar, dan tidak berzina, barang siapa yang melakukan yang demikian itu, niscaya dia mendapat (pembalasan) dosa(nya),

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين لا يدعون مع الله إلها آخر ولا يقتلون النفس التي حرم الله» قتلها «إلا بالحق ولا يزنون ومن يفعل ذلك» أي واحدا من الثلاثة «يلق أثاما» أي عقوبة
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَدۡعُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ وَلَا يَقۡتُلُونَ ٱلنَّفۡسَ ٱلَّتِي حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بِٱلۡحَقِّ وَلَا يَزۡنُونَۚ وَمَن يَفۡعَلۡ ذَٰلِكَ يَلۡقَ أَثَامٗا (أَثَامًا: عِقَابًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang tidak menyembah tuhan yang lain beserta Allah dan tidak membunuh jiwa yang diharamkan Allah) membunuhnya (kecuali dengan alasan yang benar, dan tidak berzina, barang siapa yang melakukan demikian itu) yakni salah satu di antara ketiga perbuatan tadi (niscaya dia mendapat pembalasan dosanya) hukumannya

ar: یُضَـٰعَفۡ لَهُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ یَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِیَـٰمَةِ وَیَخۡلُدۡ فِیهِۦ مُهَانًا
ar_simple: يُضَاعَفْ لَهُ الْعَذَابُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَيَخْلُدْ فِيهِ مُهَانًا

t.sahih-int: Multiplied for him is the punishment on the Day of Resurrection, and he will abide therein humiliated
t.asad: [but] shall have his suffering doubled on Resurrection Day: for on that [Day] he shall abide in ignominy
t.yusuf-ali: (But) the Penalty on the Day of Judgment will be doubled to him, and he will dwell therein in ignominy
t.pickthall: The doom will be doubled for him on the Day of Resurrection, and he will abide therein disdained for ever
t.arberry: of sin-doubled shall be the chastisement for him on the Resurrection Day, and he shall dwell therein humbled
t.hilali-khan: The torment will be doubled to him on the Day of Resurrection, and he will abide therein in disgrace
t.itani: The punishment will be doubled for him on the Day of Resurrection, and he will dwell therein in humiliation forever.
t.mubarakpuri: The torment will be doubled for him on the Day of Resurrection, and he will abide therein in disgrace;
t.qarib: that will be multiplied for him on the Day of Resurrection, and he will remain in humiliation forever
t.wahiduddin: he shall have his suffering doubled on the Day of Resurrection and he will abide forever in disgrace
t.shakir: The punishment shall be doubled to him on the day of resurrection, and he shall abide therein in abasement
t.haleem: their torment will be doubled on the Day of Resurrection, and they will remain in torment, disgraced
t.maariful: the punishment will be doubled for him, and he will remain there disdained, for ever
t.khattab: Their punishment will be multiplied on the Day of Judgment, and they will remain in it forever, in disgrace
t.ghali: Doubled will be the torment for him on the Day of the Resurrection, and he will eternally (abide) therein degraded
t.irving: Torment will be doubled for him on Resurrection Day and he will remain disgraced forever in it
t.iwq: Multiplied for him is the punishment on the Day of Rising, and he will abide therein humiliated

t_id.kemenag: (yakni) akan dilipat gandakan azab untuknya pada hari kiamat dan dia akan kekal dalam azab itu, dalam keadaan terhina,
t_id.sabiq: Pada hari kiamat, dia akan mendapatkan siksa yang berlipat ganda dan kekal di dalamnya dalam keadaan hina dan tercela.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yakni akan dilipatkan) menurut qiraat yang lain ia dibaca Yudha'afu dengan ditasydidkan huruf `Ainnya (azab untuknya pada hari kiamat dan dia akan kekal dalam azab itu) Fi'il tadi bila dibaca Jazm yakni Yudha'af dan Yakhlud maka kedudukannya menjadi Badal, jika keduanya dibaca Rafa' yakni Yudha'afu dan Yakhludu berarti keduanya merupakan jumlah Isti'naf (dalam keadaan terhina) lafal Muhaanan berkedudukan menjadi Hal atau keterangan keadaan.
t_id.iwq: (yakni) akan dilipat gandakan azab untuknya pada hari kiamat dan dia akan kekal dalam azab itu, dalam keadaan terhina,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يُضاعَف» وفي قراءة يضعَف بالتشديد «له العذاب يوم القيامة ويخلد فيه» بجزم الفعلين بدلا وبرفعها أستئنافا «مهانا» حال
tafsir.siraj-ar: يُضَٰعَفۡ لَهُ ٱلۡعَذَابُ يَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ وَيَخۡلُدۡ فِيهِۦ مُهَانًا (مُهَانًا: ذَلِيلًا حَقِيرًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yakni akan dilipatkan) menurut qiraat yang lain ia dibaca Yudha'afu dengan ditasydidkan huruf `Ainnya (azab untuknya pada hari kiamat dan dia akan kekal dalam azab itu) Fi'il tadi bila dibaca Jazm yakni Yudha'af dan Yakhlud maka kedudukannya menjadi Badal, jika keduanya dibaca Rafa' yakni Yudha'afu dan Yakhludu berarti keduanya merupakan jumlah Isti'naf (dalam keadaan terhina) lafal Muhaanan berkedudukan menjadi Hal atau keterangan keadaan

ar: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلࣰا صَـٰلِحࣰا فَأُو۟لَـٰۤئِكَ یُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَیِّءَاتِهِمۡ حَسَنَـٰتࣲۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورࣰا رَّحِیمࣰا
ar_simple: إِلَّا مَنْ تَابَ وَآمَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا فَأُولَٰئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ اللَّهُ سَيِّئَاتِهِمْ حَسَنَاتٍ ۗ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا

t.sahih-int: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful
t.asad: Excepted, however, shall be they who repent and attain to faith and do righteous deeds: for it is they whose [erstwhile] bad deeds God will transform into good ones - seeing that God is indeed much-forgiving, a dispenser of grace
t.yusuf-ali: Unless he repents, believes, and works righteous deeds, for Allah will change the evil of such persons into good, and Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful
t.pickthall: Save him who repenteth and believeth and doth righteous work; as for such, Allah will change their evil deeds to good deeds. Allah is ever Forgiving, Merciful
t.arberry: save him who repents, and believes, and does righteous work -- those, God will change their evil deeds into good deeds, for God is ever All-forgiving, All-compassionate
t.hilali-khan: Except those who repent and believe (in Islamic Monotheism), and do righteous deeds, for those, Allah will change their sins into good deeds, and Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful
t.itani: Except for those who repent, and believe, and do good deeds. These—God will replace their bad deeds with good deeds. God is ever Forgiving and Merciful.
t.mubarakpuri: Except those who repent and believe, and do righteous deeds; for those, Allah will change their sins into good deeds, and Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful.
t.qarib: except those who repent, believe and do righteous work, [in that case] God will replace their evil deeds with good ones for God is ever-forgiving and Merciful-to-all
t.wahiduddin: except for those who repent and believe and do good deeds. God will change the evil deeds of such people into good ones: He is most forgiving and most merciful
t.shakir: Except him who repents and believes and does a good deed; so these are they of whom Allah changes the evil deeds to good ones; and Allah is Forgiving, Merciful
t.haleem: except those who repent, believe, and do good deeds: God will change the evil deeds of such people into good ones. He is most forgiving, most merciful
t.maariful: except the one who repents and believes and does good deeds, then Allah will replace the evils of such people by good deeds, and Allah is Most-Forgiving, Very-Merciful
t.khattab: As for those who repent, believe, and do good deeds, they are the ones whose evil deeds Allah will change into good deeds. For Allah is All-Forgiving, Most Merciful
t.ghali: Except him who repents, and believes, and does righteous deed (s). So those, Allah will turn (Or: substitue fair deeds in place of odious ones) their odious (deeds) into fair (deeds); and Allah has been Ever-Forgiving, Ever-Merciful
t.irving: except for someone who repents and believes, and acts in a honorable manner. God will replace their evil deeds with fine ones, since God is Forgiving, Merciful
t.iwq: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful

t_id.kemenag: kecuali orang-orang yang bertaubat, beriman dan mengerjakan amal saleh; maka itu kejahatan mereka diganti Allah dengan kebajikan. Dan adalah Allah maha Pengampun lagi Maha Penyayang.
t_id.sabiq: Akan tetapi barangsiapa bertobat atas dosa-dosa tersebut, beriman dengan benar dan menyertainya dengan ketaatan dan amal saleh, maka dia akan diampuni. Kejahatan mereka yang telah lalu akan diganti dengan kebaikan yang akan dibalas dengan pahala yang sangat besar. Sesungguhnya Allah Maha Penyayang lagi Maha Pengampun.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali orang-orang yang bertobat dan mengerjakan amal saleh) dari kalangan mereka (maka kejahatan mereka itu diganti Allah) maksudnya dosa-dosa yang telah disebutkan tadi diganti oleh Allah (dengan kebaikan) di akhirat kelak. (Dan adalah Allah Maha Pengampun lagi Maha Penyayang) Dia tetap bersifat demikian.
t_id.iwq: kecuali orang-orang yang bertaubat, beriman dan mengerjakan amal saleh; maka itu kejahatan mereka diganti Allah dengan kebajikan. Dan adalah Allah maha Pengampun lagi Maha Penyayang.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «إلا من تاب وآمن وعمل عملا صالحا» منهم «فأولئك يبدِّل الله سيئاتهم» المذكورة «حسنات» في الآخرة «وكان الله غفورا رحيما» أي لم يزل متصفا بذلك
tafsir.siraj-ar: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلٗا صَٰلِحٗا فَأُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمۡ حَسَنَٰتٖۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورٗا رَّحِيمٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Kecuali orang-orang yang bertobat dan mengerjakan amal saleh) dari kalangan mereka (maka kejahatan mereka itu diganti Allah) maksudnya dosa-dosa yang telah disebutkan tadi diganti oleh Allah (dengan kebaikan) di akhirat kelak. (Dan adalah Allah Maha Pengampun lagi Maha Penyayang) Dia tetap bersifat demikian

ar: وَمَن تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحࣰا فَإِنَّهُۥ یَتُوبُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَتَابࣰا
ar_simple: وَمَنْ تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَإِنَّهُ يَتُوبُ إِلَى اللَّهِ مَتَابًا

t.sahih-int: And he who repents and does righteousness does indeed turn to Allah with [accepted] repentance
t.asad: and seeing that he who repents and [thenceforth] does what is right has truly turned unto God by [this very act of] repentance
t.yusuf-ali: And whoever repents and does good has truly turned to Allah with an (acceptable) conversion
t.pickthall: And whosoever repenteth and doeth good, he verily repenteth toward Allah with true repentance
t.arberry: and whosoever repents, and does righteousness, he truly turns to God in repentance
t.hilali-khan: And whosoever repents and does righteous good deeds, then verily, he repents towards Allah with true repentance
t.itani: Whoever repents and acts righteously—has inclined towards God with repentance.
t.mubarakpuri: And whosoever repents and does righteous good deeds; then indeed he has repented to Allah Mataba.
t.qarib: Whoever repents and acts righteously has truly returned to God in repentance
t.wahiduddin: He who repents and does good deeds has truly turned to God
t.shakir: And whoever repents and does good, he surely turns to Allah a (goodly) turning
t.haleem: People who repent and do good deeds truly return to God
t.maariful: Whoever repents and does righteous deeds turns to Allah truly
t.khattab: And whoever repents and does good has truly turned to Allah properly
t.ghali: And whoever repents and does righteousness, then surely he repents to Allah a (true) repenting
t.irving: Anyone who repents and acts honorably should turn to God in repentance
t.iwq: And he who repents and does righteousness does indeed turn to Allah with accepted repentance

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang bertaubat dan mengerjakan amal saleh, maka sesungguhnya dia bertaubat kepada Allah dengan taubat yang sebenar-benarnya.
t_id.sabiq: Demikianlah ketentuan Kami yang berlaku, yaitu barangsiapa bertobat atas dosanya dan dibuktikan dengan taat dan menjauhi maksiat, maka Allah akan menerima tobatnya. Dengan tobat itulah dia kembali kepada Tuhannya setelah menjauh dari-Nya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang yang bertobat) dari dosa-dosanya selain dari orang-orang yang telah disebutkan tadi (dan mengerjakan amal saleh, maka sesungguhnya dia bertobat kepada Allah dengan tobat yang sebenar-benarnya) dia kembali kepada-Nya dengan bertobat, maka Dia akan membalasnya dengan kebaikan.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang bertaubat dan mengerjakan amal saleh, maka sesungguhnya dia bertaubat kepada Allah dengan taubat yang sebenar-benarnya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومن تاب» من ذنوبه غير من ذكر «وعمل صالحا فإنه يتوب إلى الله متابا» أي يرجع إليه رجوعا فيجازيه خيرا
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمَن تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحٗا فَإِنَّهُۥ يَتُوبُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَتَابٗا (مَتَابًا: رُجُوعًا صَحِيحًا)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang yang bertobat) dari dosa-dosanya selain dari orang-orang yang telah disebutkan tadi (dan mengerjakan amal saleh, maka sesungguhnya dia bertobat kepada Allah dengan tobat yang sebenar-benarnya) dia kembali kepada-Nya dengan bertobat, maka Dia akan membalasnya dengan kebaikan

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ لَا یَشۡهَدُونَ ٱلزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِٱللَّغۡوِ مَرُّوا۟ كِرَامࣰا
ar_simple: وَالَّذِينَ لَا يَشْهَدُونَ الزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا بِاللَّغْوِ مَرُّوا كِرَامًا

t.sahih-int: And [they are] those who do not testify to falsehood, and when they pass near ill speech, they pass by with dignity
t.asad: And [know that true servants of God are only] those who never bear witness to what is false, and [who], whenever they pass by [people engaged in] frivolity, pass on with dignity
t.yusuf-ali: Those who witness no falsehood, and, if they pass by futility, they pass by it with honourable (avoidance)
t.pickthall: And those who will not witness vanity, but when they pass near senseless play, pass by with dignity
t.arberry: And those who bear not false witness and, when they pass by idle talk, pass by with dignity
t.hilali-khan: And those who do not witness falsehood, and if they pass by some evil play or evil talk, they pass by it with dignity
t.itani: And those who do not bear false witness; and when they come across indecencies, they pass by with dignity.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who do not bear witness to falsehood, and if they pass by some evil play or evil talk, they pass by it with dignity.
t.qarib: Those who do not testify to falsehood, and, when they pass near ill speech, pass by with dignity
t.wahiduddin: And those who do not bear false witness, and when they pass by frivolity, they pass by with dignity
t.shakir: And they who do not bear witness to what is false, and when they pass by what is vain, they pass by nobly
t.haleem: [The servants of the Lord of Mercy are] those who do not give false testimony, and who, when they see some frivolity, pass by with dignity
t.maariful: and those who do not witness falsehood, and when they pass by the absurd things, Pass by them with dignity
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ those who do not bear false witness, and when they come across falsehood, they pass ˹it˺ by with dignity
t.ghali: And who do not testify to false witness (i.e., illegal sexual intercourse) and, when they pass by idle talk, pass by honorably
t.irving: and those who will not bear false witness, and when they pass by [people] gossiping, pass by in a dignified manner
t.iwq: And they are those who do not testify to falsehood, and when they pass near ill speech, they pass by with dignity

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang tidak memberikan persaksian palsu, dan apabila mereka bertemu dengan (orang-orang) yang mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan yang tidak berfaedah, mereka lalui (saja) dengan menjaga kehormatan dirinya.
t_id.sabiq: Kedelapan, tidak melakukan sumpah palsu. Kesembilan, jika menemukan perkataan atau perbuatan yang tidak terpuji dari seseorang, mereka tidak larut melakukannya dan memilih tidak menemaninya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang tidak memberikan persaksian palsu) yakni kesaksian yang dusta dan batil (dan apabila mereka bertemu dengan orang-orang yang mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan yang tidak berfaedah) seperti perkataan-perkataan yang buruk dan perbuatan-perbuatan yang lainnya (mereka lalui saja dengan menjaga kehormatan dirinya) mereka berpaling daripadanya.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang tidak memberikan persaksian palsu, dan apabila mereka bertemu dengan (orang-orang) yang mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan yang tidak berfaedah, mereka lalui (saja) dengan menjaga kehormatan dirinya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين لا يشهدون الزور» أي الكذب والباطل «وإذا مرّوا باللغو» من الكلام القبيح وغيره «مروا كراما» معرضين عنه
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَشۡهَدُونَ ٱلزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّواْ بِٱللَّغۡوِ مَرُّواْ كِرَامٗا (لَا يَشْهَدُونَ الزُّورَ: لَا يَشْهَدُونَ بِالكَذِبِ، وَلَا يَحْضُرُونَ مَجَالِسَ الكَذِبِ, مَرُّوا بِاللَّغْوِ: مَرُّوا بِأَهْلِ البَاطِلِ وَالكَلَامِ القَبِيحِ وَمَا لَا يَنْفَعُ, كِرَامًا: مُعْرِضِينَ مُنْكِرِينَ يَتَنَزَّهُونَ عَنْهُ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang tidak memberikan persaksian palsu) yakni kesaksian yang dusta dan batil (dan apabila mereka bertemu dengan orang-orang yang mengerjakan perbuatan-perbuatan yang tidak berfaedah) seperti perkataan-perkataan yang buruk dan perbuatan-perbuatan yang lainnya (mereka lalui saja dengan menjaga kehormatan dirinya) mereka berpaling daripadanya

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِءَایَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَمۡ یَخِرُّوا۟ عَلَیۡهَا صُمࣰّا وَعُمۡیَانࣰا
ar_simple: وَالَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَمْ يَخِرُّوا عَلَيْهَا صُمًّا وَعُمْيَانًا

t.sahih-int: And those who, when reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall upon them deaf and blind
t.asad: and who, whenever they are reminded of their Sustainer’s messages, do not throw themselves upon them [as if] deaf and blind
t.yusuf-ali: Those who, when they are admonished with the Signs of their Lord, droop not down at them as if they were deaf or blind
t.pickthall: And those who, when they are reminded of the revelations of their Lord, fall not deaf and blind thereat
t.arberry: who, when they are reminded of the signs of their Lord, fall not down thereat deaf and blind
t.hilali-khan: And those who, when they are reminded of the Ayat (proofs, evidences, verses, lessons, signs, revelations, etc.) of their Lord, fall not deaf and blind thereat
t.itani: And those who, when reminded of the revelations of their Lord, do not fall before them deaf and blind.
t.mubarakpuri: And those who, when they are reminded of the Ayat of their Lord, fall not deaf and blind thereat.
t.qarib: and those who, when reminded of their Lord's revelations, do not turn a deaf ear or a blind eye
t.wahiduddin: who do not turn a blind eye and a deaf ear to the signs of their Lord when they are reminded of them
t.shakir: And they who, when reminded of the communications of their Lord, do not fall down thereat deaf and blind
t.haleem: who, when reminded of their Lord’s signs, do not turn a deaf ear and a blind eye to them
t.maariful: and those who, when they are reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall at them as deaf and blind ones
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ those who, when reminded of the revelation of their Lord, do not turn a blind eye or a deaf ear to it
t.ghali: And who, when they are reminded of the signs of their Lord, do not collapse there deaf and totally blind (Literally: all- blind)
t.irving: who whenever they are reminded of their Lord´s signs, do not fall down deaf and blind [when reminded] of them
t.iwq: And those who, when reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall upon them deaf and blind

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang-orang yang apabila diberi peringatan dengan ayat-ayat Tuhan mereka, mereka tidaklah menghadapinya sebagai orang-orang yang tuli dan buta.
t_id.sabiq: Kesepuluh, apabila dinasihati oleh seseorang dan dibacakan ayat-ayat Allah, mereka mendengarkannya dengan seksama. Kalbu mereka tergugah, dan hati kecil mereka terbuka. Mereka tidak seperti orang-orang yang gelisah ketika mendengar ayat-ayat Allah dan berpaling darinya. Bagi orang-orang yang tidak mendengarkan ayat-ayat Allah, ayat-ayat tersebut tidak menembus pendengaran mereka dan penglihatan mereka pun tertutup darinya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang apabila diberi peringatan) diberi nasihat dan pelajaran (dengan ayat-ayat Rabb mereka) yakni Alquran (mereka tidak menghadapinya) mereka tidak menanggapinya (sebagai orang-orang yang tuli dan buta) tetapi mereka menghadapinya dengan cara mendengarkannya sepenuh hati dan memikirkan isinya serta mengambil manfaat daripadanya.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang-orang yang apabila diberi peringatan dengan ayat-ayat Tuhan mereka, mereka tidaklah menghadapinya sebagai orang-orang yang tuli dan buta.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين إذا ذُكِّروا» وعظوا «بآيات ربِّهم» أي القرآن «لم يخرّوا» يسقطوا «عليها صما وعمياناً» بل خروا سامعين ناظرين منتفعين
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُواْ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ لَمۡ يَخِرُّواْ عَلَيۡهَا صُمّٗا وَعُمۡيَانٗا (لَمْ يَخِرُّوا: لَمْ يَقَعُوا سُجُودًا غَافِلِينَ، بَلْ سَجَدُوا مُطِيعِينَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang apabila diberi peringatan) diberi nasihat dan pelajaran (dengan ayat-ayat Rabb mereka) yakni Alquran (mereka tidak menghadapinya) mereka tidak menanggapinya (sebagai orang-orang yang tuli dan buta) tetapi mereka menghadapinya dengan cara mendengarkannya sepenuh hati dan memikirkan isinya serta mengambil manfaat daripadanya

ar: وَٱلَّذِینَ یَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبۡ لَنَا مِنۡ أَزۡوَ ٰجِنَا وَذُرِّیَّـٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعۡیُنࣲ وَٱجۡعَلۡنَا لِلۡمُتَّقِینَ إِمَامًا
ar_simple: وَالَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا

t.sahih-int: And those who say, "Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous
t.asad: and who pray “O our Sustainer! Grant that our spouses and our offspring be a joy to our eyes, and cause us to be foremost among those who are conscious of Thee!”
t.yusuf-ali: And those who pray, "Our Lord! Grant unto us wives and offspring who will be the comfort of our eyes, and give us (the grace) to lead the righteous
t.pickthall: And who say: Our Lord! Vouchsafe us comfort of our wives and of our offspring, and make us patterns for (all) those who ward off (evil)
t.arberry: who say, 'Our Lord, give us refreshment of our wives and seed, and make us a model to the godfearing
t.hilali-khan: And those who say: "Our Lord! Bestow on us from our wives and our offspring who will be the comfort of our eyes, and make us leaders for the Muttaqun" (pious - see V. 2:2 and the footnote of V)
t.itani: And those who say, “Our Lord, grant us delight in our spouses and our children, and make us a good example for the righteous.”
t.mubarakpuri: And those who say: "Our Lord! Bestow on us from our wives and our offspring the comfort of our eyes, and make us leaders of those who have Taqwa."
t.qarib: and those who say, "Our Lord, give us joy in our spouses and offspring, and make us a good example for those who are ever mindful of You
t.wahiduddin: who say, "Lord, grant us joy in our wives and children and make us a model for the righteous
t.shakir: And they who say: O our Lord! grant us in our wives and our offspring the joy of our eyes, and make us guides to those who guard (against evil)
t.haleem: those who pray, ‘Our Lord, give us joy in our spouses and offspring. Make us good examples to those who are aware of You’
t.maariful: and those who say, “Our Lord, Give us, from our spouses and our children, comfort of eyes, and make us heads of the God-fearing.”
t.khattab: ˹They are˺ those who pray, “Our Lord! Bless us with ˹pious˺ spouses and offspring who will be the joy of our hearts, and make us models for the righteous.”
t.ghali: And who say, "Our Lord, bestow upon us from our spouses and offsprings comfort of the eyes, (Literally: the coolness (when)the eyes settle down) and make us an imam (Leader) of the pious
t.irving: and [rather] who say: "Our Lord, bestow the comfort of our eyes on us in our spouses and our offspring. Make us a model for those who do their duty
t.iwq: And those who say, "Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous

t_id.kemenag: Dan orang orang yang berkata: "Ya Tuhan kami, anugrahkanlah kepada kami isteri-isteri kami dan keturunan kami sebagai penyenang hati (kami), dan jadikanlah kami imam bagi orang-orang yang bertakwa.
t_id.sabiq: Kesebelas, mereka selalu memohon kepada Tuhan agar istri-istri dan anak-anak mereka dijadikan sebagai penyenang hati karena kebaikan yang mereka lakukan. Mereka juga berdoa agar dijadikan sebagai pemimpin dalam kebaikan yang diikuti oleh orang-orang yang saleh.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang berkata, "Ya Rabb kami! Anugerahkanlah kepada kami istri-istri kami dan keturunan kami) ia dapat dibaca secara jamak sehingga menjadi Dzurriyyaatinaa, dapat pula dibaca secara Mufrad, yakni Dzurriyyatinaa (sebagai penyenang hati kami) artinya kami melihat mereka selalu taat kepada-Mu (dan jadikanlah kami imam bagi orang-orang yang bertakwa.") yakni pemimpin dalam kebaikan.
t_id.iwq: Dan orang orang yang berkata: "Ya Tuhan kami, anugrahkanlah kepada kami isteri-isteri kami dan keturunan kami sebagai penyenang hati (kami), dan jadikanlah kami imam bagi orang-orang yang bertakwa.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «والذين يقولون ربنا هب لنا من أزواجنا وذرياتنا» بالجمع والإفراد «قرة أعين» لنا بأن نراهم مطيعين لك «واجعلنا للمتقين إماما» في الخير
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبۡ لَنَا مِنۡ أَزۡوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعۡيُنٖ وَٱجۡعَلۡنَا لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا (قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ: تَقَرُّ بِهِمْ عُيُونُنَا، وَبِهِمْ نَانَسُ وَنَفْرَحُ, إِمَامًا: قُدْوَةً يُقْتَدَى بِه فِي الخَيْرِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan orang-orang yang berkata, "Ya Rabb kami! Anugerahkanlah kepada kami istri-istri kami dan keturunan kami) ia dapat dibaca secara jamak sehingga menjadi Dzurriyyaatinaa, dapat pula dibaca secara Mufrad, yakni Dzurriyyatinaa (sebagai penyenang hati kami) artinya kami melihat mereka selalu taat kepada-Mu (dan jadikanlah kami imam bagi orang-orang yang bertakwa.") yakni pemimpin dalam kebaikan

ar: أُو۟لَـٰۤئِكَ یُجۡزَوۡنَ ٱلۡغُرۡفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ وَیُلَقَّوۡنَ فِیهَا تَحِیَّةࣰ وَسَلَـٰمًا
ar_simple: أُولَٰئِكَ يُجْزَوْنَ الْغُرْفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا وَيُلَقَّوْنَ فِيهَا تَحِيَّةً وَسَلَامًا

t.sahih-int: Those will be awarded the Chamber for what they patiently endured, and they will be received therein with greetings and [words of] peace
t.asad: [Such as] these will be rewarded for all their patient endurance [in life] with a high station [in paradise], and will be met therein with a greeting of welcome and peace
t.yusuf-ali: Those are the ones who will be rewarded with the highest place in heaven, because of their patient constancy: therein shall they be met with salutations and peace
t.pickthall: They will be awarded the high place forasmuch as they were steadfast, and they will meet therein with welcome and the ward of peace
t.arberry: Those shall be recompensed with the highest heaven, for that they endured patiently, and they shall receive therein a greeting and --' Peace
t.hilali-khan: Those will be rewarded with the highest place (in Paradise) because of their patience. Therein they shall be met with greetings and the word of peace and respect
t.itani: Those will be awarded the Chamber for their patience, and will be greeted therein with greetings and peace.
t.mubarakpuri: Those will be rewarded with the highest place because of their patience. Therein they shall be met with greetings and the word of peace and respect.
t.qarib: All of them will be awarded the highest paradise for what they patiently endured and they will be received with greetings of peace
t.wahiduddin: These are the ones who will be rewarded with lofty mansions in Paradise, for their steadfastness. They will be received therein with greetings of welcome and salutations of peace
t.shakir: These shall be rewarded with high places because they were patient, and shall be met therein with greetings and salutations
t.haleem: These servants will be rewarded with the highest place in Paradise for their steadfastness. There they will be met with greetings and peace
t.maariful: Such people will be rewarded with the high place - because they observed patience - and will be received therein with prayers of their eternal life and peace
t.khattab: It is they who will be rewarded with ˹elevated˺ mansions ˹in Paradise˺ for their perseverance, and will be received with salutations and ˹greetings of˺ peace
t.ghali: Those will be recompensed with the compartment (s) for that they (endured) patiently, and they shall be granted therein a greeting and "Peace
t.irving: Those will be rewarded with the Mansion because they have been so patient, and welcomed there with greetings as well as "Peace [be on you]
t.iwq: Those will be awarded the Chamber for what they patiently endured, and they will be received therein with greetings and words of peace

t_id.kemenag: Mereka itulah orang yang dibalasi dengan martabat yang tinggi (dalam surga) karena kesabaran mereka dan mereka disambut dengan penghormatan dan ucapan selamat di dalamnya,
t_id.sabiq: Mereka yang memiliki ciri-ciri seperti itu--sebagai telah disebutkan sebelumnya--adalah para hamba Allah yang sejati. Mereka akan mendapatkan kedudukan yang luhur di surga, sebagai balasan dari kesabaran dan ketaatan mereka. Di dalam surga, mereka akan mendapatkan penghormatan dan ucapan keselamatan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka itulah orang-orang yang dibalasi dengan martabat yang tinggi) di surga kelak (karena kesabaran mereka) di dalam menjalankan taat kepada Allah (dan mereka disambut) dapat dibaca Yulaqqauna dengan memakai Tasydid, sebagaimana dapat pula dibaca Yalqauna (di dalamnya) yakni di surga yang paling tinggi martabatnya itu (dengan penghormatan dan ucapan selamat) dari para Malaikat.
t_id.iwq: Mereka itulah orang yang dibalasi dengan martabat yang tinggi (dalam surga) karena kesabaran mereka dan mereka disambut dengan penghormatan dan ucapan selamat di dalamnya,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أولئك يجزوْن الغرفة» الدرجة العليا في الجنة «بما صبروا» على طاعة الله «ويُلقَّون» بالتشديد والتخفيف مع فتح الياء «فيها» في الغرفة «تحية وسلاما» من الملائكة
tafsir.siraj-ar: أُوْلَـٰٓئِكَ يُجۡزَوۡنَ ٱلۡغُرۡفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُواْ وَيُلَقَّوۡنَ فِيهَا تَحِيَّةٗ وَسَلَٰمًا (الْغُرْفَةَ: أَعْلَى مَنَازِلِ الجَنَّةِ, وَسَلَامًا: تَسْلِيمًا مِنَ المَلَائِكَةِ، وَسَلَامَةً مِنَ الآفَاتِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka itulah orang-orang yang dibalasi dengan martabat yang tinggi) di surga kelak (karena kesabaran mereka) di dalam menjalankan taat kepada Allah (dan mereka disambut) dapat dibaca Yulaqqauna dengan memakai Tasydid, sebagaimana dapat pula dibaca Yalqauna (di dalamnya) yakni di surga yang paling tinggi martabatnya itu (dengan penghormatan dan ucapan selamat) dari para Malaikat

ar: خَـٰلِدِینَ فِیهَاۚ حَسُنَتۡ مُسۡتَقَرࣰّا وَمُقَامࣰا
ar_simple: خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ حَسُنَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا

t.sahih-int: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence
t.asad: therein to abide: [and] how goodly an abode and [how high] a station
t.yusuf-ali: Dwelling therein;- how beautiful an abode and place of rest
t.pickthall: Abiding there for ever. Happy is it as abode and station
t.arberry: Therein they shall dwell forever; fair it is as a lodging-place and an abode
t.hilali-khan: Abiding therein; excellent it is as an abode, and as a place to dwell
t.itani: Abiding therein forever—it is an excellent residence and destination.
t.mubarakpuri: Abiding therein -- excellent it is as an abode, and as a place to rest in.
t.qarib: and will live there for eternity. What an excellent home and place of rest
t.wahiduddin: There they shall abide forever: a blessed dwelling and a blessed resting place
t.shakir: Abiding therein; goodly the abode and the resting-place
t.haleem: There they will stay- a happy home and resting place
t.maariful: living in it (the Paradise) for ever. It is best as an abode and as a place to dwell in
t.khattab: staying there forever. What an excellent place to settle and reside
t.ghali: Eternally (abiding) therein; fair it is as a repository and a stationing
t.irving: to live there forever. How fine is such a residence and status
t.iwq: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence

t_id.kemenag: mereka kekal di dalamnya. Surga itu sebaik-baik tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman.
t_id.sabiq: Kenikmatan yang mereka peroleh di surga adalah kekal dan tidak pernah putus. Surga itu merupakan tempat menetap dan kediaman yang terbaik.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Mereka kekal di dalamnya, surga itulah sebaik-baik tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman) yakni tempat kediaman buat mereka. Lafal Ulaaika dan sesudahnya menjadi Khabar dari lafal 'Ibaadur Rahmaan pada ayat 63 tadi.
t_id.iwq: mereka kekal di dalamnya. Surga itu sebaik-baik tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «خالدين فهيا حسُنت مستقرا ومقاما» موضع إقامة لهم وأولئك وما بعده خبر عباد الرحمن المبتدأ
tafsir.siraj-ar: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَاۚ حَسُنَتۡ مُسۡتَقَرّٗا وَمُقَامٗا
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Mereka kekal di dalamnya, surga itulah sebaik-baik tempat menetap dan tempat kediaman) yakni tempat kediaman buat mereka. Lafal Ulaaika dan sesudahnya menjadi Khabar dari lafal 'Ibaadur Rahmaan pada ayat 63 tadi

ar: قُلۡ مَا یَعۡبَؤُا۟ بِكُمۡ رَبِّی لَوۡلَا دُعَاۤؤُكُمۡۖ فَقَدۡ كَذَّبۡتُمۡ فَسَوۡفَ یَكُونُ لِزَامَۢا
ar_simple: قُلْ مَا يَعْبَأُ بِكُمْ رَبِّي لَوْلَا دُعَاؤُكُمْ ۖ فَقَدْ كَذَّبْتُمْ فَسَوْفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامًا

t.sahih-int: Say, "What would my Lord care for you if not for your supplication?" For you [disbelievers] have denied, so your denial is going to be adherent
t.asad: SAY [unto those who believe]: “No weight or value would my Sustainer attach to you were it not for your faith [in Him]!” And say unto those who deny the truth:] “You have indeed given the lie [to God’s message], and in time this [sin] will cleave unto you!”
t.yusuf-ali: Say (to the Rejecters): "My Lord is not uneasy because of you if ye call not on Him: But ye have indeed rejected (Him), and soon will come the inevitable (punishment)
t.pickthall: Say (O Muhammad, unto the disbelievers): My Lord would not concern Himself with you but for your prayer. But now ye have denied (the Truth), therefor there will be judgment
t.arberry: Say: 'My Lord esteems you not at all were it not for your prayer, for you have cried lies, and it shall surely be fastened
t.hilali-khan: Say (O Muhammad SAW to the disbelievers): "My Lord pays attention to you only because of your invocation to Him. But now you have indeed denied (Him). So the torment will be yours for ever (inseparable permanent punishment)
t.itani: Say, “What are you to my Lord without your prayers? You have denied the truth, and the inevitable will happen.”
t.mubarakpuri: Say: "My Lord pays attention to you only because of your invocation to Him. But now you have indeed denied. So the torment will be yours forever."
t.qarib: Say [to unbelievers], "What would my Lord care for you if not for your prayers to Him?" But since you have denied the truth as lies, [punishment] will inevitably befall you
t.wahiduddin: Say, "What would my Lord care for you, if you do not call on Him. Because you have indeed rejected the truth and His punishment is bound to overtake you
t.shakir: Say: My Lord would not care for you were it not for your prayer; but you have indeed rejected (the truth), so that which shall cleave shall come
t.haleem: [Prophet, tell the disbelievers], ‘What are you to my Lord without your supplication? But since you have written offthe truth as lies, the inevitable will happen.’
t.maariful: Say (O Prophet), “My Lord will never care about you, if you will not invoke Him. Now since you rejected (the truth), the punishment will be inseparable from you.”
t.khattab: Say, ˹O Prophet,˺ “You ˹all˺ would not ˹even˺ matter to my Lord were it not for your faith ˹in Him˺. But now you ˹disbelievers˺ have denied ˹the truth˺, so the torment is bound to come.”
t.ghali: Say, (To the disbelievers)" In no way would my Lord care for you were it not for your invocation. Yet you have cried lies, so it (Punishment) will eventually be an imposition
t.irving: SAY: "My Lord will never care about you unless you appeal to Him. Yet since you have rejected [Him], something else will be necessary
t.iwq: Say, "What would my Lord care for you if not for your supplication?" For you disbelievers have denied, so your denial is going to be adherent

t_id.kemenag: Katakanlah (kepada orang-orang musyrik): "Tuhanku tidak mengindahkan kamu, melainkan kalau ada ibadatmu. (Tetapi bagaimana kamu beribadat kepada-Nya), padahal kamu sungguh telah mendustakan-Nya? karena itu kelak (azab) pasti (menimpamu)".
t_id.sabiq: Katakanlah, wahai Rasul, kepada umat manusia, "Sesungguhnya tidak penting bagi Allah dari kalian kecuali kalian menyembah dan berdoa kepada-Nya, tidak selain-Nya. Oleh karena itulah Dia menciptakan kalian. Akan tetapi, orang-orang kafir di antara kalian telah mendustakan apa yang dibawa oleh Rasul. Karenanya, azab yang akan menimpa mereka merupakan sebuah kemestian, dan mereka tidak akan dapat menyelamatkan diri dari azab itu."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah,) hai Muhammad kepada penduduk Mekah ("Tiada) lafal Maa bermakna Nafi (mengindahkan) menghiraukan (Rabbku akan kalian melainkan kalau ada ibadah kalian) kepada-Nya di waktu kalian tertimpa kesengsaraan dan musibah, kemudian Dia menghilangkannya dari kalian (padahal sesungguhnya) maksudnya mana mungkin Dia memperhatikan kalian, (sedangkan kalian telah mendustakan) Rasul dan Alquran (karena itu kelak akan ada) azab (yang pasti.") menimpa kalian di akhirat, selain daripada azab yang akan menimpa kalian di dunia. Akhirnya di antara mereka banyak yang terbunuh di dalam perang Badar; jumlah mereka yang terbunuh ada tujuh puluh orang. Sedangkan yang menjadi Jawab dari lafal Laulaa terkandung di dalam pengertian kalimat yang sebelumnya.
t_id.iwq: Katakanlah (kepada orang-orang musyrik): "Tuhanku tidak mengindahkan kamu, melainkan kalau ada ibadatmu. (Tetapi bagaimana kamu beribadat kepada-Nya), padahal kamu sungguh telah mendustakan-Nya? karena itu kelak (azab) pasti (menimpamu)".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «قل» يا محمد لأهل مكة «ما» نافية «يعبأ» يكترث «بكم ربي لولا دعاؤكم» إياه في الشدائد فيكشفها «فقد» أي فكيف يعبأ بكم وقد «كذبتم» الرسول والقرآن «فسوف يكون» العذاب «لزاما» ملازما لكم في الآخرة بعد ما يحلّ بكم في الدنيا، فقتل منهم يوم بدر سبعون وجواب لولا دلَّ عليه ما قبلها
tafsir.siraj-ar: قُلۡ مَا يَعۡبَؤُاْ بِكُمۡ رَبِّي لَوۡلَا دُعَآؤُكُمۡۖ فَقَدۡ كَذَّبۡتُمۡ فَسَوۡفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامَۢا (مَا يَعْبَأُ: مَا يَكْتَرِثُ بِكُمْ وَلَا يُبَالِي, دُعَاؤُكُمْ: عِبَادَتُكُمْ وَسُؤَالُكُمْ إِيَّاهُ, لِزَامًا: عَذَابًا مُلَازِمًا لَكُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Katakanlah,) hai Muhammad kepada penduduk Mekah ("Tiada) lafal Maa bermakna Nafi (mengindahkan) menghiraukan (Rabbku akan kalian melainkan kalau ada ibadah kalian) kepada-Nya di waktu kalian tertimpa kesengsaraan dan musibah, kemudian Dia menghilangkannya dari kalian (padahal sesungguhnya) maksudnya mana mungkin Dia memperhatikan kalian, (sedangkan kalian telah mendustakan) Rasul dan Alquran (karena itu kelak akan ada) azab (yang pasti.") menimpa kalian di akhirat, selain daripada azab yang akan menimpa kalian di dunia. Akhirnya di antara mereka banyak yang terbunuh di dalam perang Badar; jumlah mereka yang terbunuh ada tujuh puluh orang. Sedangkan yang menjadi Jawab dari lafal Laulaa terkandung di dalam pengertian kalimat yang sebelumnya
